label: attendence
text: Hello Professor I will be unable to attend class tomorrow due to a personal family emergency that requires me to travel out of town immediately

label: attendence
text: Dear Instructor please excuse my absence from today's lecture as I have come down with a sudden illness and need to visit the health clinic

label: attendence
text: Hi there I am writing to let you know that I have a scheduled medical appointment this Friday morning and will be missing our weekly seminar

label: attendence
text: Good morning I will be absent from class next Tuesday because I have been selected to attend a professional development conference for my major

label: attendence
text: Professor I am so sorry for missing yesterday's session as I experienced some unexpected car trouble on my way to campus and could not make it

label: attendence
text: Hello I wanted to inform you ahead of time that I will be missing class on the 24th to observe a religious holiday with my family

label: grade_dispute
text: Dear Professor I am writing because I noticed a discrepancy between the feedback on my essay and the final grade posted in the gradebook

label: grade_dispute
text: Hello I would like to schedule a time to discuss my recent exam results because I believe there may have been an error in how question four was scored

label: grade_dispute
text: Hi I am confused about the points deducted from my last lab report and was hoping you could clarify the specific grading criteria used for the conclusion

label: grade_dispute
text: Professor after reviewing the rubric I feel that my participation grade does not accurately reflect my contributions to the weekly discussion boards

label: grade_dispute
text: Dear Instructor I am reaching out to see if there is any possibility for a regrade on my project as I believe I met all the requirements listed in the prompt

label: grade_dispute
text: Hello I noticed that my grade for the midterm is much lower than expected and I would appreciate the chance to review my mistakes during office hours

label: academic_integrity
text: Dear Professor I am writing to self report that I accidentally included a paragraph in my paper without proper citation and I want to fix it immediately

label: academic_integrity
text: Hello I received an email regarding a potential plagiarism concern on my assignment and I would like to meet to explain my research process

label: academic_integrity
text: Hi I am concerned that a classmate may have copied my code during the lab session today and I wanted to bring this to your attention privately

label: academic_integrity
text: Professor I am reaching out to clarify the collaboration policy for the upcoming take home exam to ensure I do not violate any course rules

label: academic_integrity
text: Dear Instructor I wanted to clarify that the similarities in our group project were due to shared notes and not an attempt to circumvent the integrity policy

label: academic_integrity
text: Hello I am very nervous about the notification I received regarding the Proctorio flag on my exam and I would like to explain what happened

label: accommodation_request
text: Hello Professor I am an authorized student with the disability services office and I have attached my official letter regarding extended testing time

label: accommodation_request
text: Dear Instructor I am writing to request a quiet testing environment for our upcoming midterm as specified in my formal accommodation plan

label: accommodation_request
text: Hi I would like to discuss how we can best implement my need for closed captioning on the video lectures assigned for this module

label: accommodation_request
text: Professor I am reaching out to notify you that I require the use of a laptop for note taking during class as part of my approved academic adjustments

label: accommodation_request
text: Good morning I have been approved for flexible deadlines due to a chronic health condition and I wanted to discuss how this applies to our weekly quizzes

label: accommodation_request
text: Hello I am sending over my accommodation forms which indicate that I require copies of lecture slides in advance of our class meetings

label: advising/enrollment
text: Dear Advisor I am trying to enroll in your course but I am receiving a prerequisite error even though I completed the equivalent credit last summer

label: advising/enrollment
text: Hello Professor I am interested in joining your research lab next semester and was wondering if you have any openings for undergraduate students

label: advising/enrollment
text: Hi I am currently on the waitlist for your section and was wondering if there is any chance you will be expanding the enrollment capacity

label: advising/enrollment
text: Professor would you be able to sign a late add form for me so that I can officially join the class before the registration deadline tomorrow

label: advising/enrollment
text: Hello I am a senior needing this specific course to graduate this spring and I was hoping you could grant me an override into the full section

label: advising/enrollment
text: Dear Instructor I am writing to ask if you would be willing to serve as my faculty mentor for my independent study project next academic year

label: deadline_extension
text: Professor I have been struggling with a severe bout of the flu this week and was hoping for a two day extension on the final project

label: deadline_extension
text: Hello I am writing to ask if it would be possible to submit my reflection paper on Monday instead of Friday due to an overlapping work schedule

label: deadline_extension
text: Dear Instructor our group has encountered some data collection issues and we were wondering if we could have a 48 hour extension to finish the report

label: deadline_extension
text: Hi I am reaching out to see if I can have an extra day for the homework assignment as I am currently dealing with some difficult personal circumstances

label: deadline_extension
text: Professor I have three other exams scheduled for the same day as our paper deadline and I was hoping for a short extension to ensure quality work

label: deadline_extension
text: Hello I apologize for the short notice but I have had a death in the family and would appreciate some extra time to complete this weeks coursework

label: technical/LMS_issue
text: Professor I tried to upload my assignment five minutes ago but the submission link on Canvas seems to be broken or expired

label: technical/LMS_issue
text: Hello I am having trouble accessing the required reading link on the course website and was wondering if there is an alternate way to view the pdf

label: technical/LMS_issue
text: Hi I just finished the online quiz but my computer crashed before I could hit submit and now I am locked out of the attempt

label: technical/LMS_issue
text: Dear Instructor I am unable to view the feedback comments you left on my essay and I was hoping you could resend them as a direct attachment

label: technical/LMS_issue
text: Hello I am reaching out because the video lecture for week five does not have any audio and I wanted to make sure it was not just a problem on my end

label: technical/LMS_issue
text: Professor I mistakenly uploaded the wrong file version to the portal and it will not let me resubmit so I have attached the correct document here
